title: NHKマイルカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Guess everybody really loves these G1
races—just listen to that crowd!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No way! I can't wait to get goin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Winning in these big races is what's gonna bring
me closer to becoming Umamusume of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Plus, the G1 level's where all the strongest
Umamusume are at! It's bound to be heaps of fun!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm so excited, I'm fit to curse!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, that! But ya gotta admit, my way's got a
certain ring to it! Hehe.
